tasks.title: Research official contracts, origin systems, and judgesystem runtime before opening full-autonomy capabilities
Enable gated remote draft PR creation/update for PRAgent and align workflow execution mode
Enable gated delegated writer binding for CodeGenAgent while keeping scripts/automation as the runtime home
Strengthen ReviewAgent with repo-root execution, score/retry/escalation artifacts, and workflow-aligned env gates
Extend DeploymentAgent from a command gate to a deploy contract with preflight, healthcheck, rollback, artifacts, and workflow env gates
Keep plan, Claude-side definitions, AGENTS, and workflow comments aligned with the runtime that actually exists
Validate push/PR Actions, permissions, env gates, and failure paths while rolling out autonomy slices
Keep issue/comment triggers planning-first by default while allowing explicit execute only behind repository-variable gates
Add deployment approval/provider-target metadata and make workflow execution pass the actual deploy env gates through to DeploymentAgent
Add a dedicated GitHub Environment-backed deploy execute workflow for protected deployments and align docs with that path
Add a repo-local Cloud Run provider preset so DeploymentAgent can resolve backend/frontend deploy commands without a bespoke per-run command string
